title: HTTP Request node returns 'credentials not found' error
symptom: When executing a workflow with the HTTP Request node, it returns a 'credentials not found' error despite having valid credentials. This occurs even when the user has admin privileges.
not_this_if: User is the owner of the credentials
root_cause: In the Community edition of n8n, credentials are private to the user who created them. Even if a user has admin rights, they cannot access credentials created by another user unless explicitly shared. This leads to the 'credentials not found' error when executing workflows that reference those credentials.
fix_steps: Create a new workflow under your own account
Add the Google Maps credential directly from the HTTP Request node
Alternatively, ask the instance owner to reselect and save the credential in the workflow
agent_instruction: Create a new workflow and add the necessary credentials directly from the HTTP Request node.
